cover.title: 6 lines so it's not all in English
cover.sub: From 'milk and sugar?' to 'let's do this again.'

phrases.en: Would you like coffee or tea?
phrases.when: You're hosting. The classic Dutch offer.

phrases.nl: Hoe lang woon je al hier?
phrases.en: How long have you lived here?
phrases.when: Easy small talk that gets them talking.

phrases.nl: Wat doe jij in het weekend?
phrases.en: What do you do on the weekend?
phrases.when: Keep it going past the weather.

phrases.nl: Gezellig! Doen we dit nog eens?
phrases.en: So nice! Shall we do this again?
phrases.when: Turn one coffee into a habit.
A warm way to say goodbye.

cta.title: Save this before you invite them in.
cta.sub: Send it to whoever waves at the neighbor but never quite talks.
